description: These high-top rustic shoes from woodland blend vintage cowboy styling with a contemporary minimal trend. These classic three-hole lace ups with a leather inner give off a subtly stylish vibe. Style this pair with kakhi cargo shorts or trousers and a casual check shirt.UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay on the heelBranding embossed on the lateral side of the midfootThree-hole central lace ups Padded tongueSoft insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heelStitch detailing on the seams of the toe boxMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with flex groovesCurved midfootshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
